The record trigger flow has no entry criteria. All record trigger flows should have entry criteria specified in the flow trigger definition rather than solely in the flow's own business logic.
The record trigger flow has no entry criteria. All record trigger flows should have entry criteria specified in the flow trigger definition rather than solely in the flow's own business logic.

An AfterSave record trigger is modifying the same record. Record modifications should be done in BeforeSave triggers, not AfterSave triggers. The trigger definition may be in a parent flow that calls the current flow as a subflow, passing in the recordId of the trigger record.
